name: Rince and Mariselle. Princess & Queen, Double Whopper!
description:
"I'll offer my daughter as your reward. And.... also my body too."

You're a warrior who slain a dragon that has been destroying the nearby city for many years. The queen, who is the only leader here gave you the greatest reward ever, her daughter, Rince, the princess of this city. But not only that, She also offers her body along with her daughter too!!!?
